faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.a1: We guarantee end-to-end encryption for all images and data.
faq.q2: How can I top up more credits?
faq.a2: Open the 'Top up' section in the menu to choose a package that fits your needs.
faq.q3: How can I reach you for partnership?
faq.a3: Email us directly or use the contact form with subject 'Partnership'. We'll respond within 48h.

about.title: Preserving heritage through AI
about.subtitle: We pioneer multi-agent deep learning to recognize, appraise and digitize every trace of Vietnamese and global ceramic heritage.

accuracy.title: Outstanding accuracy
accuracy.desc: Five specialized AI councils debate in real time, ensuring every origin and era judgment is multi-perspective.

data.title: Vast data trove
data.desc: Over 50,000 patterns, shapes and glazes spanning historic Eastern dynasties optimize matching and identification.

community.title: Collector community
community.desc: A knowledge playground for enthusiasts, archaeologists and ceramic experts. More than ML, The Archivist is a living archive of culture.

mission.title: Our vision and
mission.p1: Every ceramic artifact is more than an object — it carries the story of time, the soul of nature, and the essence of the artisan's hand.
mission.p2: Our mission is to extend the lifespan of memory: bringing forgotten stories alive with logic, transparency and the extraordinary power of technology.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: By using The Archivist, you agree to the following terms:
terms.s1Body: While the system uses advanced multi-agent deep learning, all outputs are advisory. AI cannot replace authoritative or expert in-person assessment in legal, certification or commercial matters. Using the platform implies you understand all transactional decisions are within your personal jurisdiction.
terms.s2Body: You exclusively own the artifact images you upload. By analyzing samples, you grant us the right to use anonymized images to improve the AI. We do not redistribute your data to third parties.
terms.s3Body: Credits never expire. Successful top-ups are non-refundable except for payment-gateway failures.
terms.s4Body: Accounts are for personal use only. Automation or reverse-engineering of the API will result in permanent access bans.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Customer privacy is the top priority at The Archivist.
privacy.s1Body: We only collect your name, email and usage history (image analyses) to verify identity and maintain credit balance. Uploaded images are encrypted on internal servers.
s2Items: Process multi-agent AI requests for ceramic artifacts.
Display analysis logs on your personal interface.
Improve AI weights via anonymized images.
privacy.s3Body: We do not store card numbers, internet banking credentials or credit card details. All top-ups go through PCI-DSS-compliant gateways via VietQR and MoMo.
privacy.s4Body: To request deletion of your personal history, including journal entries, contact The Archivist via 'Expert contact'. Your data will be permanently destroyed in compliance with GDPR.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Policy
dataDeletion.subtitle: Instructions on requesting account and data deletion at The Archivist
dataDeletion.s1Body: According to user data protection regulations (including Google Play and App Store policies), you have the right to request the complete deletion of your account and all associated personal data from The Archivist system at any time.
dataDeletion.s2Body: When a deletion request is executed, the following information will be permanently destroyed and cannot be recovered:
s2Items: Account profile info: Name, Email, phone number, and avatar.
Appraisal history: All uploaded artifact images and AI debate results.
Transaction history: Top-up logs and remaining credit balance.
Activity logs and token audit logs linked to your account.
dataDeletion.s3Body: You can request deletion through 2 methods:
s3Items: Method 1: Send an email request to our support email at dongnguyenkh123@gmail.com using your registered account email.
Method 2: Access your Profile section in the app and submit a deletion request in account settings.
dataDeletion.s4Body: Your request will be received and processed by our technical team. Data will be completely removed from our primary databases and backups within a maximum of 30 days from request receipt.

paymentSettingsPage.sepayDesc: Bank transfer payment using automated VietQR scanning. The system uses SePay polling API to verify and credit tokens automatically.
